phase_statuses.title: Text Baseline and Formal English Copy Contract
phase_statuses.objective: finalize exact replacement text set for the scoped files and remove confirmed mojibake strings.
deliverables: text-only diffs with formal English copy and no mojibake literals in scoped files.
phase_statuses.evidence_expectation: diff review + targeted grep evidence over scoped paths.

acceptance_criteria.text: No garbled/mojibake user-facing strings remain in the scoped source files.
All changed user-facing strings in scoped source files are English and formal in tone.
Changes are text-only (string/comment/test-label updates), with no control-flow or API contract changes.

phase_statuses.title: Test Alignment and Real-Browser Validation
phase_statuses.objective: align linked tests with finalized copy and verify behavior in unit + Playwright coverage.
deliverables: passing scoped test commands with recorded evidence.
phase_statuses.evidence_expectation: command outputs and Playwright artifacts (report/trace/screenshot/video as available).

acceptance_criteria.text: Scoped unit tests pass for updated copy assertions.
Real-browser Playwright validation passes for unauthorized page visibility and approval-config spec string checks.
No files outside Scope and linked tests are modified.

phase_statuses.notes: - Blocked by Playwright bootstrap prerequisite: py launcher resolves to missing C:\\Python314\\python.exe

blocking_prereqs: Playwright global setup blocked: Windows py launcher resolves to missing C:\\Python314\\python.exe
goal: 修复前端乱码、将中文文案改为英文并提升描述正式度
